name: Sheetal Dhoke
feedback: Happy and Satisfied. Best Dental Implant Clinic. Thank you Das Dental clinic.

name: Dr. Kajal Navani
feedback: Dr Lokesh is very humble as well as a great dental surgeon with smooth and gentle handling of the procedures done. He explains the procedures to be done also in detail and simple way. My Family's choice since ages.

name: Shital Kohale
feedback: I got my braces treatment and wisdom teeth removed at Dr Daswani. Whole one year experience was pleasant and painless. And end result smile is fabulous.

name: Chandani Meshram
feedback: I had a gummy smile to begin with. Used to come from Pune to Nagpur for braces. Finished treatment today and it was all worth the travel. Best braces doctor in Nagpur and beyond.

name: Vipul Khanuja
feedback: Highly impressed with the treatment at Das Dental Clinic! Dr. Omprakash Daswani is very professional, gentle, and explains everything with great clarity. The clinic is clean, hygienic, and equipped with the latest technology. Definitely one of the best dental clinics in town — highly recommended!

name: Sarah Mcwann
feedback: My experience was great. The clinic is clean, the doctors treat you really well with the right and appropriate medication. Location is convenient and it is affordable. Would suggest this place for your dental issues to have some gentle care.
